name: NewSecGap Phase 59 — IM Domain 9 CSVs: Copy, URL Backfill, Q2 Audit
description: Bring 9 IM domain CSVs from data/outputs/ into data/outputs/im/*.final.csv with ~85%+ per-row confidence. Three steps: (1) copy to final; (2) MCSB IM URL backfill; (3) Q1-C spot-checks + Q2 new-feature audit. Lighter than NS Phase 57+58 — only 1 now_applicable_native row (already covered), 0 conditional rows, heavy N/A profile. Retired service (intelligentrecommendations) needs graceful handling.
confidenceGap: All 9 CSVs are v2 schema but have zero URL coverage (8/9 services). 309 rows total. 1 now_applicable_native row already has source URL (apimanagement LT-1). 0 conditional rows. Heavy N/A profile. intelligentrecommendations is a retired service (~2023), trustedhardwareim is all-N/A infrastructure.

readFirst.why: Phase log through Phase 58, scope gates
Section inventory — im/ folder does not yet exist; note gap
Individual patch pattern (for Q1-C if needed)
9 source CSVs — read header + sample rows

csvSchema.noteUpdatePattern: Append to existing notes — do NOT replace. Pattern: '{existing} | {evidence}. Source: {url}'
csvSchema.supplementNotePattern: v2 gap: {description}. Source: {url} | Q2-{group} WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA.

verdictTaxonomy.changeRule: Do NOT change verdict without evidence. Q1-C may flip still_not_applicable to now_applicable_native if confirmed.

targetFiles.note: LT-1 now_applicable_native already has source URL
Service RETIRED ~2023 — no MCSB baseline expected
ALL 35 rows N/A — infrastructure service, all N/A expected

workstreams.name: Copy to Final
workstreams.action: mkdir -p data/outputs/im/ && copy 9 source CSVs to data/outputs/im/{slug}.final.csv. Idempotent (skip if dest exists).

workstreams.name: MCSB URL Verification + Backfill
workstreams.preStep: Python urllib HEAD-verify 9 MCSB IM URLs before writing script — correct any 404 slugs
workstreams.fallbackForRetired: Leave notes unchanged for intelligentrecommendations and trustedhardwareim if no baseline found

workstreams.name: Key still_not_applicable Spot-Checks
workstreams.description: 4 high-value N/A rows to verify still hold June 2026. Parallel WebSearch.

rows.query: Azure AD Domain Services managed identity support 2025 2026
Azure Cloud Shell private endpoint supported 2025 2026
Azure Bot Service Entra ID Conditional Access data plane 2025
Azure Universal Print Entra ID authentication MFA supported 2025

workstreams.action: If confirmed N/A: add standard rationale note. If flipped: update verdict + add source. Write phase59_individual_patches.py ONLY if flip found.

workstreams.name: Per-Service New-Feature Audit 2025-2026

queries.query: Azure API Management Bot Service new identity IM-1 IM-3 IM-7 managed identity Entra 2025 2026
queries.focus: API Management Entra integration improvements, Bot Service managed identity expansion

queries.query: Azure Attestation Trusted Hardware Identity Management new security feature 2025 2026
queries.focus: Attestation policy updates, THIM service changes

queries.query: Azure Spatial Anchors Cloud Shell Universal Print ADDS new identity security 2025 2026
queries.focus: Spatial Anchors deprecation, Cloud Shell private endpoint, Universal Print Entra, ADDS managed identity

workstreams.supplementCondition: Only add SUPPLEMENT row if feature is GA and maps to IM control (IM-1 through IM-8)

scriptsToWrite.condition: Only write if Q1-C finds N/A flips or if Q2 rows need note enrichment
Only write if Q2 finds at least one new GA feature

executionSteps.action: Read: CLAUDE.md, activity.log, 9 source CSVs (header + sample rows)
Python urllib HEAD-verify 9 MCSB IM baseline URLs (correct slugs before writing backfill)
If Q1-C found flips: write + run scripts/phase59_individual_patches.py
If Q2 found new features: write + run scripts/phase59_supplement_rows.py
Run quality gate — all 9 must PASS
git add -f data/outputs/im/ scripts/phase59_*.py && git commit
STOP — do not start IM ADO import or Phase 60 without user confirmation

passCriteria: trustedhardwareim: all 35 N/A rows — all should pass via 'not applicable' exemption
intelligentrecommendations: retired service rows exempt via 'retired' or 'not applicable' notes
qualityGate.command:
python3 -c "import csv
ALLOWED={'implemented','now_applicable_native','upgraded_implemented','still_not_applicable','conditional','not_applicable_paas','not_applicable_arm'}
slugs=['addds','apimanagement','attestation','botservice','cloudshell','intelligentrecommendations','spatialanchors','trustedhardwareim','universalprint']
all_ok=True
for s in slugs:
    rows=list(csv.DictReader(open(f'data/outputs/im/{s}.final.csv')))
    bad={r['verdict_2025'] for r in rows}-ALLOWED
    no_url=[r for r in rows if r['verdict_2025']=='now_applicable_native' and 'http' not in r.get('notes','')]
    uncov=[r for r in rows if 'http' not in r.get('notes','') and 'Source' not in r.get('notes','') and not any(x in r.get('notes','').lower() for x in ['infrastructure','azure platform','no customer','not applicable','monitoring service','retired','no mcsb'])]
    ok=not bad and not no_url and len(uncov)<5
    if not ok: all_ok=False
    print(f'[{\"OK\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}] {s:<28} rows={len(rows):>3} no_url={len(no_url):>2} uncov={len(uncov):>3}')
print()
print('QUALITY GATE:','PASS' if all_ok else 'FAIL')"

constraints: NO CSV recreation — enrich in-place only
intelligentrecommendations: retired service — do NOT fabricate MCSB URL; use 'service retired ~2023' in notes
trustedhardwareim: all 35 N/A expected — no enrichment needed beyond URL attempt
NO ADO operations — Phase 53 IM ADO import blocked on user providing User Story IDs
Cost hook: ignore — user standing green light
